verdict: The paper's GeV remnant mass (4.96e-15) follows from its own formula (W1a PASS); its kg value (9e-41, the press-propagated number) is ~10.2x the formula/its own GeV value (W1b FAIL) — consistent with a dropped leading zero of 0.884e-41 kg. The 1.515e77-qubit claim is exact standard Bekenstein-Hawking in bits (W2 PASS, no model-specific physics). Audit of quoted numbers only; the 7D model itself is out of scope.
